name: conductor-agent
description: Conductor Agent — Multi-Agent Economy with On-Chain Trust (ERC-8004) for Mantle Turing Test Hackathon 2026

scripts.dev: concurrently -n web,agents "npm run dev:web" "npm run dev:agents"
scripts.build: npm run build:web && npm run build:agents
scripts.deploy:contracts: cd contracts && npx hardhat run scripts/deploy.ts --network mantle
scripts.deploy:contracts:testnet: cd contracts && npx hardhat run scripts/deploy.ts --network mantleTestnet

author: Conductor Team
